title: T-006 — UI: FIN-018 Cost Centers Admin + MODAL-13 GL Mapping (§8.4 FIN-018, §8.4 FIN-021)
prompt:
# T-006 — Cost Centers Admin + GL Mapping modal UI

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.4 FIN-018 Cost Centers Admin [UNIVERSAL]; §8.4 FIN-021 GL Account Mapping Modal [INDUSTRY-CONFIG]; §8.5 MODAL-13 contract; §11.1 V-FIN-SETUP-04 hierarchy / V-FIN-SETUP-05 GL mapping.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:649-681 (`cost_center_gl_mapping_modal`)

## Goal
Server Component page `/finance/cost-centers` with treeview (left) + detail-form panel (right) for `cost_centers` hierarchy CRUD + embedded MODAL-13 dialog for create/edit + GL mapping wiring.

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:649-681` for MODAL-13. Cost Centers Admin page itself is marked `[NO-PROTOTYPE-YET]` for the tree view (PRD §8.4 FIN-018 note) — implement structurally using shadcn Sidebar / Tree primitive + the modal as the create/edit dialog. Re-use shared finance shell.
shadcn primitives: Dialog, DialogContent, DialogFooter, Form, FormField, Select, SelectItem, Input, Checkbox, Button, Card, Separator, Tooltip.
Parity checklist (MODAL-13):
1. Modal size 'default'; create/edit shared via `editing` boolean from props.
2. Code Input (alphanumeric + dash, max 20, Zod regex `/^[A-Z0-9\-]{1,20}$/`).
3. Name Input (max 100).
4. Parent Cost Center Select (loaded via `getCostCenterTree` from T-004; excludes self + descendants to prevent cycle — V-FIN-SETUP-04 client-side; server trigger is SoT).
5. Production Line Select (from 02-Settings join — read-only list for P1).
6. Allocation Basis Select (labor_hours / machine_hours / units).
7. D365 Dimension Code Input (`[ORG-CONFIG]` marker).
8. Is Active Checkbox.
9. Save button → `createCostCenter` or `updateCostCenter` Server Action (T-004); on cycle violation from trigger, surfaces user-facing error message.
GL Mapping modal (FIN-021, same prototype file): triggered from a sub-tab on the page (or embedded in FIN-016 D365 Integration GL Mapping tab — T-030).

## Implementation contract
1. `app/finance/cost-centers/page.tsx` — RSC fetches `getCostCenterTree()` + paginates flat list.
2. `app/finance/cost-centers/_components/cost-center-tree.tsx` ('use client') — shadcn Tree-style sidebar component (build minimal recursive Tree using nested `<ul>` + Tailwind indent).
3. `app/finance/cost-centers/_components/cost-center-modal.tsx` — MODAL-13 dialog ('use client') wraps shadcn Dialog with form state.
4. `app/finance/cost-centers/_components/gl-mapping-modal.tsx` — FIN-021 dialog (separate `<Dialog>` invocation but reuses same form primitives).
5. RBAC: visible to `fin.cost_center.admin`; non-admins see read-only tree.

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/cost-centers/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/cost-centers/_components/cost-center-tree.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/cost-centers/_components/cost-center-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/cost-centers/_components/gl-mapping-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/cost-centers/_components/__tests__/cost-center-modal.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/cost-centers/_components/__tests__/cost-center-tree.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given MODAL-13 dialog renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:649-681, then field labels + Save/Cancel + Active match 1:1 (RTL parity snapshot — structural + visual + interaction parity verified).
- Given edit mode for cost center A with child B, when Parent dropdown opens, then A and B are absent (cycle-prevention UX).
- Given user submits Code 'cc with space', when Zod validates, then submission fails with regex error. AND given d365_account_code 'BAD-FORMAT' on GL modal, when submit, then Zod rejects the malformed account code.
- Given user without fin.cost_center.admin, when page renders, then admin buttons hidden and tree is read-only. AND given a race cycle attempt and DB trigger raises, when action returns, then modal surfaces a friendly error message (no raw exception).
Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a separate AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F13 2026-05-14).
_(AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: cost-center-modal.test.tsx asserts parity, parent dropdown excludes self+descendants, Zod regex on Code + d365 account code, RBAC button visibility, error-surface flow on DB trigger raise.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/cost-centers`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement cycle detection only in the UI — the DB trigger from T-003 is SoT.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate per shadcn primitives.
- Do not skip the `[ORG-CONFIG]` / `[INDUSTRY-CONFIG]` marker indicators in the UI (per UX doc convention).
- Do not delete a cost center that has child rows — surface ON DELETE RESTRICT error to user.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe).
